title: Boat Rental in Stockholm: A Day on the Water in 2026
html:
Stockholm offers a unique archipelago experience by boat, with vessels departing from Nybroviken or the Old Town. Day rentals range from €150 for a small motorboat to €1,500 for a crewed yacht. BoatHire24 connects you with verified options across the city.

Where to set off in Stockholm

Choose from several real departure points around the city. Nybroviken is the central harbour near the Grand Hôtel, offering easy access to the inner archipelago. Saltsjöbaden, a seaside suburb, provides a more relaxed start with parking. Vaxholm, the gateway to the outer archipelago, is 25 kilometres east of the city. For a southern route, Dalarö offers historic charm and calm waters. Each location has its own character and facilities, including fuel and provisioning.

Which boat to rent

BoatHire24 lists a variety of vessels suitable for different group sizes and budgets. Here is a selection of popular types:

  1. Motorboat, Best for exploring nearby islands like Fjäderholmarna; carries up to 8 guests; from €250 per half-day.
  2. Sailing yacht, Ideal for a leisurely day on the water; capacity up to 10 guests; from €600 for a full day.
  3. Catamaran, Spacious and stable, perfect for families; room for 12 guests; from €900 per day.
  4. Luxury motor yacht, For a premium experience, such as a Maiora 26m, which includes a crew and jet tender; sleeps up to 10; from €4,500 per day. For full details, visit the Maiora 26m charter page.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Stockholm?

Prices range from €50 per person for a shared group tour to €4,500 per day for a crewed luxury yacht. This variation depends on boat size, duration, and season. For a more comprehensive breakdown, consider these typical price bands:

  • Shared archipelago tour: €50, €80 per person for 3 hours
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): €150, €300
  • Catamaran full day with skipper: €800, €1,200
  • Crewed yacht (up to 12 guests) full day: €1,000, €4,500

To see current availability and compare verified boat listings, browse yacht charter in Stockholm on BoatHire24.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Stockholm?

In Sweden, no licence is required for boats under 10 metres in length, but operators confirm exact requirements. Larger vessels or those with more powerful engines may require a certified skipper. Always check with the listing owner before booking.

For a calm and sheltered route, head towards the Fjäderholmarna islands, just 20 minutes from Nybroviken. These car-free islets have traditional cafés and craft shops ideal for a lunch stop.

What is the best season for boating in Stockholm?

The main season runs from May to September, with July and August offering the warmest weather (averaging 20°C). During these months, the prevailing wind is southwesterly, often light to moderate. Book early for peak weeks as demand is high.

At a glance

  • Price range: €50, €4,500 per trip
  • Peak months: June to August
  • Typical trip length: 3, 8 hours
  • Maximum capacity: up to 12 guests on most yachts
  • Currency: EUR (widely accepted, though SEK is local)

Questions about boat rental in Stockholm

Can I rent a boat in Stockholm without a licence?

Yes, many boats under 10 metres are available without a licence, but the owner will confirm the specific requirements during booking.

How many people can fit on a typical chartered yacht?

Most yachts for hire accommodate between 4 and 12 guests, with larger vessels such as the Maiora 26m offering space for up to 10.

What is the distance from Stockholm to the outer archipelago?

The outer islands such as Landsort are roughly 30 nautical miles from central Stockholm, taking about 2 hours by motorboat at cruising speed.

Is it cheaper to book a shared tour or a private boat?

Shared tours start at €50 per person, while private boats cost from €150 for a small vessel; private options give you more flexibility.

Whether you are looking to spend a day exploring the Stockholm archipelago or considering listing your own vessel, the BoatHire24 marketplace makes it easy to connect with renters and owners. Boat owners can list their boats and earn income from one of the world's most scenic boating destinations.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Stockholm and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
